abilities.description: NICKNAME gains indestructible until end of turn.

triggers.description: At end of combat, if CARDNAME and at least two other creatures attacked this combat, exile NICKNAME, then return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control.

abilities.description: Up to one target creature an opponent controls attacks CARDNAME during its controller's next turn if able.

effect.description: Up to one target creature an opponent controls attacks CARDNAME during its controller's next turn if able.
effect.name: DelayedTrigger

abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature an opponent controls

abilities.description: Until your next turn, target creature gains indestructible. Untap that creature.
Until end of turn, CARDNAME becomes a 4/4 Human Soldier creature with indestructible that's still a planeswalker. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to him this turn.
